description_long: This is a rectangular wooden table with a dark brown finish, featuring a smooth, flat tabletop and four robust, turned legs. The legs are ornately carved, giving the table a classic and somewhat traditional appearance. The wood grain is visible across the tabletop, adding a natural texture and visual depth. The table appears sturdy and is likely constructed from solid wood, suitable for supporting significant weight. There are no visible drawers, handles, or additional components, emphasizing its simple, functional design. This table would be well-suited for use in urban parks, outdoor cafes, or communal gathering spaces.
description: A dark brown, rectangular wooden table with a smooth top and four carved, sturdy legs. The design is classic and functional, with visible wood grain and no extra features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the tabletop and two carved front legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the tabletop and the profile of all four legs.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the tabletop and the two rear legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the length and all four legs from the other side.
